title: Severe Feather Pecking
author: EURCAW-Poultry-SFA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This factsheet is about severe feather pecking in laying hens.  Two protocols to assess the pecking damages are detailed in this factsheet.
